payload.name: NVIDIA Corporation
payload.narrative: NVIDIA sits at the center of the B-group watchlist as the reference name for AI-accelerator demand. The workspace tracks it as a research subject only: what the dual-engine pipeline observed over the last 5 trading days, which catalysts are on the calendar, and where the primary data sources disagree. Nothing here is a recommendation to buy, sell, or hold.
catalysts: Data-center GPU demand cycle and hyperscaler capex commentary
Quarterly earnings and forward guidance cadence
